message:
feat(http/h1): add HTTP CONNECT tunnel and Expect: 100-continue handling

Implement full HTTP CONNECT tunnel support in the client layer for
HTTPS-over-proxy use cases. The new HttpConnectTunnel type handles
prefetched-byte draining after the CONNECT handshake, implements
AsyncRead/AsyncWrite delegation, and exposes connect_tunnel() and
connect_tunnel_tls() entry points on HttpClient with proper error
variants (ConnectTunnelRefused, InvalidConnectInput).

On the server side, add RFC 7231 compliant Expect header classification:
requests with "100-continue" receive an interim 100 response before the
body is read, while unsupported expectation tokens trigger a 417
Expectation Failed rejection. Add the missing 417 reason phrase to the
status code table.

Clean up body.rs tests to use idiomatic let-else and matches! patterns,
reducing noise without changing semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
